detail: Bulk commodities are sold by the tonne (cost = $/t of product). Metals are sold as metal/concentrate, so '$/t ore milled' is internal; the meaningful figure is cost per unit CONTAINED METAL (C1/AISC). Roughly a third of India's 30 critical minerals are BY-PRODUCTS with no standalone mining cost.
Cash/production cost is well below market price (e.g. copper sells >$10,000/t while C1 ~$4,400-6,000/t Cu; uranium price ~$70-95/lb vs cost $15-60/lb).

Grade, method, depth, geography, currency and by-product credits can move a single commodity's unit cost 3-5x. Treat as orientation, not precision. Many critical-mineral costs are proprietary; driver logic is more reliable than the dollar figure.
C1 = direct cash cost. AISC adds sustaining capex, deferred stripping, G&A and closure accruals (usually per lb Cu / per oz Au).

India imports >90% of most critical minerals; classifies coal/lignite/uranium/thorium as fuel minerals; grades non-coking coal G1-G17 by GCV; thorium & much REE/zircon are beach-sand (monazite/ilmenite) co-products under Atomic Energy regulation.
Ministry of Mines / PIB, 30 critical minerals (June-July 2023); National Critical Mineral Mission (2025).
Rio Tinto FY2025 (Pilbara FOB ~$23.5/wmt; Cu C1 67c/lb); UBS peer notes; Capstone Pinto Valley 2025 reserve cost assumptions; MDPI open-pit copper cost study (2025).
IEA Coal 2025; Alpha Metallurgical 2025 guidance ($103-108/t met coal); US EIA coal reports.
Industry cost tiers (ISR $15-30/lb; avg $30-60/lb; high-cost $60-120+/lb); BHP Olympic Dam ~$45-50/lb; EIA & UxC.
S&P Global Mine Cost Outlook 2026 (Pt AISC ~$1,006/oz; Au AISC ~$1,475-1,521/oz); silver AISC ~$26.86/oz (2024).
USGS MCS 2026 (cobalt); IEA Global Critical Minerals Outlook 2025; Thunder Said Energy (REE ~$70/kg blended for viable IRR).
USGS MCS 2025; ChemAnalyst/IMARC bauxite pricing; Fastmarkets/SMM manganese (per dmtu).
Figures paraphrased & compiled June 2026 for orientation. Verify against current company guidance or a cost-curve provider (Wood Mackenzie, CRU, S&P Global) before publication.
